# Masterpet Landing Page - LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI search engines and language models understand our website

## Website Overview
Masterpet is a premium pet grooming service based in Kochi, Kerala, India. We provide professional, at-home pet grooming services for dogs and cats, bringing the salon experience to your doorstep.

## Core Services
- Professional pet grooming (dogs and cats)
- At-home grooming services
- Pet hygiene and wellness
- Grooming consultations
- Specialized care for different breeds

## Target Audience
- Pet owners in Kochi and surrounding areas
- Dog and cat owners seeking professional grooming
- Pet parents who prefer convenient at-home services
- Pet owners looking for gentle, professional care

## Key Information
- **Location**: Kochi, Kerala, India
- **Service Type**: Mobile pet grooming
- **Animals Served**: Dogs and cats
- **Service Area**: Kochi and nearby regions
- **Business Model**: At-home service provider

## Website Structure
- Home page: Service overview and booking
- Contact page: Location and contact information
- Service areas: Kochi pet grooming details
- Legal pages: Privacy policy, terms, cancellation policy
- Grooming reports: Post-service documentation

## Content Guidelines for AI
- Focus on pet care, grooming, and wellness
- Emphasize convenience and professional service
- Highlight at-home service benefits
- Include local (Kochi) context and relevance
- Maintain pet-friendly, caring tone

## Important Pages
- `/` - Main landing page with service overview
- `/contact` - Contact information and location
- `/kochi-pet-grooming` - Service area details
- `/privacy` - Privacy policy
- `/terms-and-conditions` - Terms of service
- `/cancellation-policy` - Booking cancellation terms

## Business Keywords
- Pet grooming Kochi
- Dog grooming at home
- Cat grooming service
- Mobile pet grooming
- Professional pet care
- Pet hygiene services
- At-home pet grooming
- Pet wellness

## Contact Information
- Service Area: Kochi, Kerala, India
- Service Type: Mobile pet grooming
- Target: Pet owners seeking professional grooming

## Additional Resources
- Sitemap: https://www.masterpet.co.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: https://www.masterpet.co.in/robots.txt

## AI-Friendly Notes
- This is a local business serving Kochi area
- Services are provided at customer's home
- Focus on convenience and professional care
- Pet safety and comfort are priorities
- Services available for both dogs and cats

## Content Focus Areas
- Pet grooming expertise
- Convenience of at-home service
- Professional pet care standards
- Local service area (Kochi)
- Pet health and wellness
- Customer satisfaction and safety

## Language and Tone
- Professional yet caring
- Pet-friendly and approachable
- Emphasize convenience and quality
- Local context for Kochi residents
- Trust-building and reliability focused
